steps.description: Follow the Tutorial and kill the Bloated Miller
Claim your Quest Reward Skill Gem from Renly
steps.hint: Check Renly's Shop for any items you can afford

steps.description: (Optional) Loot the Abandoned Stash in the Mysterious Campsite
steps.hint: Contains an Uncut Skill Gem. Checkpoint nearby to make it easier to spot.

steps.description: (Permanent Buff) Defeat Beira of the Rotten Pack in the Middle North of the zone
steps.hint: +10% to Cold Resistance permanent buff

steps.description: Activate the Waypoint and enter the Mud Burrow

steps.hint: Level 2 Uncut Skill Gem Drop

steps.description: Portal to Town and Speak to Renly for Uncut Support Gem Quest Reward
Return to Clearfell via Waypoint and head North East to enter The Grelwood
(Optional) Areagne's Hut: Flask Upgrades from Cauldron + Kill Areagne for Uncut Support Gem
(Optional) Kill Brambleghast: Level 1 Uncut Skill Gem drop
Activate Tree of Souls Waypoint, enter Grim Tangle and activate Waypoint, return to Grelwood
Enter the Red Vale and activate three Rust Altars
steps.hint: Entrance is usually near Brambleghast
Each Altar is located in a broad loop around the zone

steps.description: Portal to Town. Return all three Runed Quest Items to Renly
Go to Grelwood via Waypoint. Summon Una and Runed Spike the Tree of Souls
Waypoint to Town and speak to Una again
Return to Grelwood and enter the Grim Tangle
(Optional) Kill The Rotten Druid: Uncut Support Gem
Enter The Cemetery of the Eternals
(Optional) Loot the Ancient Ruins Grave Site: Random Ring
Locate and complete Mausoleum of the Praetor and Tomb of the Consort (in any order)
(Optional) Loot the Forgotten Riches: Gold and Random Loot
(Optional) Activate the Embattled Trove ambush and defeat Rare Eternal Knight: Uncut Support Gem
Return to Cemetery. Once both bosses killed, speak to Lachlann and open Memorial Gate
Enter Hunting Grounds, Waypoint to Town and speak to Una
(Permanent Buff) Kill The Crowbell: +2 Passive Skill Points
steps.hint: Look for a wooden swing door with obvious arena nearby

steps.description: (Optional) Kill the Dryads at the Dryadic Ritual: Uncut Support Gem
(Optional) Complete the Ritual Site: Level 4 Uncut Skill Gem
Enter Freythorn, and activate the Waypoint
Enter Ogham Village, and activate the Waypoint
Return to Town via Waypoint and check Una for Greater Life Flask and Greater Mana Flask if needed
Activate the final Ritual and kill The King in the Mists
steps.hint: You can purchase Items from the Ritual Altar afterwards

steps.description: Activate Gembloom Skull: +30 Spirit and Uncut Spirit Gem
Portal to Town and speak to Finn for a Quest Reward choice of Ruby/Sapphire/Topaz Charms
steps.hint: A Sapphire Charm is recommended for the upcoming final Act 1 boss

steps.description: Take the Waypoint to Ogham Farmlands
(Permanent Buff) Find Una's Lute in a ruined hut (behind broken carts)
steps.hint: Return Lute to Una in town for +2 Passive Skill Points

steps.description: (Optional) Kill the Rare Feral Mutt in the Crop Circle: Level 4 Uncut Skill Gem
Locate Renley's Workshop Smithing Tools (Anvil Sign, Large Building)
steps.hint: Only needed on first character per league

steps.description: Free Leitis and proceed to Manor Ramparts
Waypoint to town to talk to Leitis: Level 5 Uncut Skill Gem
steps.hint: Good time to turn in Una's Lute, Renley's Tools and do gear management

steps.description: (Optional) Cut down the Hanged Man at the Gallows: Uncut Support Gem
steps.hint: You can click the Hanged Man from downstairs

steps.description: Portal to Town and speak to The Hooded One to proceed to Act 2
Speak to Risu and Asala. Shop and gear up
steps.hint: Good time to shop and gear up

steps.description: Use the Desert Map to take the caravan to Mawdun Quarry
Proceed through the zone and take the exit to Mawdun Mine
Free Risu from the cage and speak to them
Portal to Town and speak to Risu and Asala
Use the Desert Map to travel to the Halani Gates
Travel to Traitor's Passage via the Desert Map
(Ascendancy) Locate and open the Ancient Seal
steps.hint: Located near a Lore Pillar

steps.description: Defeat Balbala, the Traitor: Balbala's Barya for Trial of Sekhemas
Summon Asala and proceed through the zone
(Optional) Kill L'im the Impaler: Level 6 Uncut Skill Gem
Run to the sandstorm until prompted to leave, then return to town
Speak to Zarka for a Level 7 Uncut Skill Gem
steps.hint: Start looking for Giant Life Flask and Giant Mana Flask upgrades if level 23

steps.description: Travel to the Trial of the Sekhemas via the Desert Map
Speak to Balbala. Place Balbala's Barya and the Urn Relic in the altar
steps.hint: Use an Orb of Augmentation to enhance the Relic if you have one

steps.description: Complete the first floor and defeat Rattlecage, the Earthbreaker
Enter the Treasure Room. Touch the Altar of Ascendancy and loot chests
steps.hint: Purchase Relics from Balbala if able

steps.description: Leave the Trial and return to Town
Travel to Keth via the Desert Map
Kill snake monsters until you find the Kabala Clan Relic
(Permanent Buff) Kill Kabala, Constrictor Queen: +2 Passives
steps.hint: Located in the middle of the zone, hiding underground in a pit with a checkpoint

steps.description: (Optional) Enter and loot the Abandoned Shrine: Chest with a guaranteed Magic Amulet

steps.hint: Located opposite side to the zone entrance, after a big bridge

steps.description: (Optional) The Golden Chest: Uncut Spirit Gem
(Optional) The Gilded Beetle: Random Ruby, Sapphire, or Emerald Jewel
Locate and use the exit to the Buried Shrines
(Optional) The Elemental Offering: Choose an Offering to obtain a Resistance Ring
steps.hint: Choose Fire if Fire Resistance is low for the upcoming boss fight

steps.description: (Optional) Open the Guarded Sarcophagus: Uncut Support Gem
Speak to the Water Goddess and claim The Essence of Water
Portal to Town and speak to Zarka for an Uncut Support Gem
Travel to the Mastodon Badlands via the Desert Map
(Optional) Loot the Shrine of Bones: Uncut Support Gem
Kill Monsters until you obtain the Sun Clan Relic
Locate and defeat Iktab and Ekbab
Portal to Town. Travel to The Valley of Titans via the Desert Map
Find and click the three ancient seals located by Titans to open the Titan Grotto
(Permanent Buff) Locate the Relic Altar near the Waypoint and place the Sun and Kabala Clan Relics
steps.hint: Choose a buff (can be changed later)

steps.description: Portal to Town and speak to Zarka: Uncut Support Gem
Travel to the Halani Gates. Use The Horn of the Vastiri at the front of the Caravan
Speak to Asala. Travel to Deshar via Desert Map
(Permanent Buff) Locate the Fallen Dekhara and take the Final Letter
steps.hint: Check the base of each round building for the Dekhara

steps.description: Exit to the Path of Mourning
Waypoint to Town. Deliver Final Letter to Shambrin: +2 Passive Points
(Optional) Shifting Vases event: Uncut Support Gem
Exit to The Spires of Deshar
(Permanent Buff) Activate the Sisters of Garukhan shrine: +10% Lightning Resistance
Portal to Town. Speak to Asala
steps.hint: Vendors can sell level 30 key items around here

steps.description: Travel to The Dreadnought via Desert Map
Fight your way to the Dreadnought Vanguard exit
steps.hint: Final checkpoint has multiple blue monsters you can farm

steps.description: Locate and defeat Jamanra, the Abomination
Speak to the Hooded One and Asala. Travel to Sandswept Marsh in Act 3
(Optional) Kill Rootdredge: Level 9 Uncut Skill Gem
(Optional) Loot Corpse at Hanging Tree: Random Magic Ring
(Optional - Highly Recommended) Kill Rare Oroks and Loot Basket in Orok Campsite: Lesser Jeweller's Orb
Speak to Alva and Oswald. Hunt for Flask upgrades and 20% Movespeed Boots
steps.hint: Good opportunity to shop
Located near the top of town
Located within stone ruins

steps.description: (Optional) Summon the NPC to the Jungle Grave: Rare Belt
steps.hint: Likely only worth doing if your belt is very bad

steps.description: (Optional) Loot the white chest in Gwendolyn Albright's Troubled Campsite
steps.hint: Gwendolyn sells high quality armour, check for upgrades

steps.description: Activate the Waypoint and Enter the Venom Crypts
Locate the Den of the Serpent Priestess and Loot the Corpse-snake Venom
Portal to Town. Give the Corpse-snake Venom to Servi
steps.hint: Choose a permanent buff reward. WARNING: This cannot be changed later!

steps.description: Waypoint to Jungle Ruins. Take the exit to Infested Barrens
steps.hint: Located on one of the outer zone edges (typically opposite the exit to town)

steps.description: Activate the Waypoint and summon Alva
steps.hint: Look for a stone platform near the water with the waypoint and a checkpoint nearby

steps.description: (Optional) Loot the white chest in Sebastian Carroway's Troubled Campsite: Rare Boots
steps.hint: This vendor also sells higher-quality weapons

steps.description: Hug the outside wall to locate the exit to the Azak Bog
Summon and speak to Servi, if needed
(Optional) Complete the Flameskin Ritual for temporary boost to Fire Resistance and Rarity
steps.hint: Only needed if your Fire Resistance is very low (below 30-40%)

steps.description: (Permanent Buff) Defeat Ignagduk, the Bog Witch: +30 Spirit and Uncut Spirit Gem
Portal to town. Speak to Servi to obtain your choice of Charm
steps.hint: Thawing is recommended if you don't have one already, otherwise Antidote

steps.description: Take the Waypoint to Infested Barrens, hug the wall until you locate the exit to Chimeral Wetlands
Enter The Temple of Chaos and activate the waypoint, then return to Chimeral Wetlands
Defeat Xyclucian, the Chimera: Obtain Chimeral Inscribed Ultimatum for Ascendancy
Locate a Small Soul Core in one of the two entrance offshoot rooms
Use Soul Core to open the door. Locate an additional Small Soul Core
(Permanent Buff) Open the door and kill Blackjaw, the Remnant: +10% Fire Resistance
(Optional - Low Priority) use a third Soul Core to unlock and loot the Treasure Vault
Obtain another Small Soul Core. Use Soul Core to open the exit to Jiquani's Sanctum
Head to the left or right generator and look for a Medium Soul Core
Place Medium Soul Core inside generator
Cut through the middle of the zone to the second generator, looking for another Medium Soul Core
Portal to Town. Speak to Alva and Oswald
(Optional) Kill The Devourer of Souls: Uncut Spirit Gem
Return to The Drowned City. Enter The Apex of Filth
Portal to Town and speak to The Hooded One to proceed to Act 4
Arrive at Kedge Bay — Gear Up
steps.hint: Speak to Tarkleigh and Nessa, shop for upgrades
Solve the stone tablet puzzle near the docks
Follow the shoreline to the ritual stones
Look for a glowing totem fragment near the central island
In the coral caves at the far end of the island
In the magma chamber, watch for lava geysers
Behind a wall of flame, use the cooling vents
Take the boat back to town
Turn in Map Fragment
Take the southern boat
Inside the ruined longhouse on the eastern cliffs
Atop the storm-wracked peak
Deep in the resonant chamber, follow the sound
Through the collapsed tunnel at the back
In the deepest cell block
Arena in the central courtyard
Through the warden's office
In the isolation chamber, break all chains to start the fight
Behind a breakable wall near the entrance
Escape route through the sewer grate
Speak to Matiki in town
Take the eastern boat with Matiki
Nest at the top of the island's central spire
In the shipwreck graveyard on the northern beach
Enter the great whirlpool portal
Reassemble the totem at the central altar
The spirit guardian of the Eye
Behind the boss arena
Portal activates after boss defeat
Choose a charm — Topaz (Shock) recommended
Take the newly opened northern path
In the buried temple ruins
Through the excavated tunnel
At the center of the ruined arena
In the collapsed library wing
Through the grand archway
Shop vendors, craft, and prepare for the final act 4 boss
Ascend the great ziggurat
Defeat the tribal champions in each side chamber
In the left antechamber after clearing it

steps.description: Kill Utula, Chieftain of the Karui
steps.hint: Final act 4 boss. Heavy physical and fire damage. Dodge the slam waves.
Speak to the Hooded One after the boss
Turn in quest before leaving

steps.description: Arrive at Holten — Talk to NPCs
steps.hint: Speak to Halden and Sigrid in the village
One-time vendor — buy Greater Runes if you have gold
Follow the river north out of town
In the northern den, follow the wolf tracks
Inside the ruined watchtower

steps.description: Kill Owsin, the Dread Warden (+2 Weapon Set Passives)
steps.hint: Use his Ledger after defeating him. Fight in the prison courtyard.
Unlock with Owsin's Key after defeating him
Descend through the cellar trapdoor
In the frozen cavern beneath Wolvenhold
At the end of the Frozen Depths
Use the lift to return to the surface
In the eastern tower, use fire to break ice barriers
In the eastern tower's uppermost chamber
Place both Frost Sigils at the gate
Act 5 final boss. Heavy cold damage — cap cold res if possible. Dodge the ice shard barrage.
Behind the boss arena — contains rare items
Antidote charm recommended for upcoming content
Speak to the Hooded One to travel south

steps.description: Arrive at Khari Crossing — Gear Up
steps.hint: Speak to Aldric and Risu at the caravan camp
Use the Molten One's Gift at Skullmaw Stairway (northern area)

steps.description: Kill Akithi + Anundr → Return to Risu (+2 Passives)
steps.target: Akithi, The Final Sting & Anundr, the Sandworm
steps.hint: Eastern area, small arena near checkpoint. Kill both bosses then report to Risu.
Search the destroyed wagons along the eastern pass
Follow the desert road south
Orbala is near the oasis at the center of town
Narrow passage off outer wall. 5% All Ele Resists or +5 Attributes recommended.
In the southern dunes, follow the bone trail
Half-buried temple in the western sands
In the sealed vault beneath the central oasis
Awakens when you take the Keystone
Use the Keystone on the ancient gate
Left side of the sanctuary — free the trapped Djinn
Right side of the sanctuary — free the second Djinn
Rare Jewel or Rare Jewellery — jewellery usually more valuable
In the inner sanctum, beyond the Djinn altars
Behind a false wall in the eastern corridor
Act 6 final boss. Uses lightning and chaos damage. Stay mobile to avoid storms.
Treasure room after boss — contains multiple currency items
Portal opens after boss defeat
Turn in all quests before moving on
Speak to the Hooded One to journey north

steps.description: Arrive at Kriar Village — Gear Up
steps.hint: Speak to Hilda and Elder Maddox
Check vendors for gear upgrades — item levels jump here
Quest boss in the village outskirts. Consume the Gemcrust Skull after defeating her.
Turn in Lythara quest
Take the northern trail out of the village
In the ice chasm — watch for avalanche traps
Examine the frozen corpse for a journal page
Side zone off the main path. Loot Icy Tusks after defeating him.
Descend through the ice tunnel
In the deepest frozen chamber
At the bottom of the Howling Depths
Use the wind tunnel to return to the surface
Use the Ancient Keystone on the frozen gate
At the peak's first plateau. Dodge the lightning strikes.
In a small cave halfway up the peak
Top of the cliff — spirits guide the path. Only one choice — pick the most valuable for trade.
Near the summit. Permanent +10% Cold Resistance buff.
Climb the final ice wall to the peak
Final campaign boss. Massive cold and physical damage. Cap cold resistance. Avoid the ice nova by staying close.
Behind the boss arena — guaranteed rare items
Portal to town after boss
Turn in all remaining quests for support gems and items
Must have completed Yeti quest first
Campaign complete! Speak to the Hooded One to unlock the Epilogue and Map Device.
